calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ann MacArthur for (trustee) Gladys Baker.

The Court asked counsel to explain if there was a drafting error or what happened in regards to the special directive. Ms. MacArthur stated that it was executed at the time of the original trust, that the original allocation is the proper allocation and that the trust was not drafted well. The Court granted the petition for instructions (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS

Application For Determination That Proposed Petition For Instruction To Ascertain Beneficiaries Does Not Violate The Terms Of The No-Contest Clause
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea Long & Ann MacArthur for (Trustee) Gladys Baker.

Ms. MacArthur stated that she has nothing further to report and that she has not heard from anyone. The Court stated that it agrees with the analysis and took the application for determination that proposed petition for instruction to ascertain beneficiaries, etc., under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
